'''''Prism''''' was a [[Carrack-class light cruiser/Legends|''Carrack''-class light cruiser]] belonging to the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]]. It was part of an operation to receive stolen [[TIE/d "Defender" Multi-Role Starfighter/Legends|TIE Defenders]] from [[Strike-class medium cruiser|''Strike''-class medium cruiser]] ''[[Nuance]]''. While the ''Nuance'' was captured, the ''Prism'' was destroyed by [[Maarek Stele/Legends|Maarek Stele]] in a [[Missile Boat]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: TIE Fighter: Defender of the Empire]]'' {{1st}}
